title: #17856 reloaded
body:
because discussion in #17856 is locked, I cannot add in response to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17856#issuecomment-1758210210 that now I am running podman 5.2.2 under EL9.5 and I am still getting healthcheck spam in logs.

containers are this compose copy pasted from their instructions: https://immich.app/docs/install/docker-compose/ and ran via podman compose

logs:

````
$ journalctl --no-hostname --user -S 20:30:23 --no-pager
Apr 13 20:30:23 podman[3486751]: 2025-04-13 20:30:23.991179768 +0300 EEST m=+0.066375927 container health_status eecfa112d2dd0a7fda72e2de3aa0dc32e9eea610c4c8113c43d62f80d3268404 (image=docker.io/library/redis@sha256:148bb5411c184abd288d9aaed139c98123eeb8824c5d3fce03cf721db58066d8, name=immich_redis, health_status=healthy, health_failing_streak=0, health_log=, PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=podman-compose@immich.service, io.podman.compose.project=immich, io.podman.compose.version=1.0.6, com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/user/immich, com.docker.compose.service=redis, com.docker.compose.container-number=1, com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yml, com.docker.compose.project=immich, io.podman.compose.config-hash=c930a701164ce75abe4c146666274ce15b145799977e89552c884c64b21b5f2e)
Apr 13 20:30:54 podman[3486883]: 2025-04-13 20:30:54.977925257 +0300 EEST m=+0.065102239 container health_status eecfa112d2dd0a7fda72e2de3aa0dc32e9eea610c4c8113c43d62f80d3268404 (image=docker.io/library/redis@sha256:148bb5411c184abd288d9aaed139c98123eeb8824c5d3fce03cf721db58066d8, name=immich_redis, health_status=healthy, health_failing_streak=0, health_log=, io.podman.compose.version=1.0.6, com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yml, io.podman.compose.config-hash=c930a701164ce75abe4c146666274ce15b145799977e89552c884c64b21b5f2e, io.podman.compose.project=immich, PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=podman-compose@immich.service, com.docker.compose.container-number=1, com.docker.compose.project=immich, com.docker.compose.service=redis, com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/user/immich)

````

````
$ rpm -qi podman
Name        : podman
Epoch       : 4
Version     : 5.2.2
Release     : 15.0.1.el9_5
Architecture: x86_64
Install Date: Fri 28 Mar 2025 06:22:50 AM EET

Build Date  : Thu 27 Mar 2025 09:51:19 PM EET

$ cat /etc/os-release

VERSION="9.5"
ID="ol"
ID_LIKE="fedora"
VARIANT="Server"
````

comments.body: You need to set healthcheck_events=false in containers.conf under the engine section if you want to disable health_status events. We will not change the default as users might depend on these events.
